description: Real hybrid search: BM25 (Meilisearch) + Vector (Qdrant) + Cohere Reranker pipeline. Upgrade the existing search package to be production-ready. Add vector embedding on UGC creation. Add 'Why am I seeing this?' explainability to every search/feed result.
steps: Enhance packages/search/src/services/hybrid-search.ts: the existing implementation already does BM25+vector fusion. Add reranker integration - after fusion, pass top-50 to CohereReranker, return reranked top-N. Add an explain() method that returns top-3 ranking signals for any result (e.g., 'matched keyword X', 'similar to items you liked', 'trending in your network').

Create packages/search/src/services/embedding-indexer.ts: UGCEmbeddingIndexer class. On content creation, generates embedding (via EmbeddingService from @quant/ml-pipeline) and upserts to Qdrant via VectorClient. Supports batch indexing for backfill. Handles both new content and content updates.

Create packages/search/src/services/search-explainer.ts: SearchExplainer class. For each search result, produces human-readable explanations of why it ranked where it did. Returns top-3 signals: BM25 keyword match contribution, vector similarity contribution, reranker relevance boost, freshness boost, social signals (friends liked). Format: { signal: string, contribution: number, humanReadable: string }[].

Add packages/search/src/services/hybrid-search-pipeline.ts: HybridSearchPipeline orchestrator class. Steps: (1) generate query embedding, (2) parallel BM25 + vector search, (3) fuse scores, (4) rerank top-50, (5) attach explanations, (6) return final results. This is the single entry point for all search requests.

Create packages/search/src/__tests__/hybrid-search-pipeline.test.ts: integration test with mocked MeiliSearch, Qdrant, Cohere, and embedding backends. Test full pipeline flow, test explain output, test fallback when reranker fails.
Create packages/search/src/__tests__/embedding-indexer.test.ts: test indexing, batch upsert, update handling.
Create packages/search/src/__tests__/search-explainer.test.ts: test explanation generation for various signal combinations.
Update packages/search/src/index.ts barrel to export new classes.
Ensure existing tests in packages/search still pass.
acceptance_criteria: HybridSearchPipeline correctly orchestrates BM25 + vector + reranker (tested with mocks)
SearchExplainer produces top-3 ranking signals for each result (tested)
UGCEmbeddingIndexer generates embeddings and upserts to Qdrant (tested)
Fallback behavior works when reranker or vector search is unavailable (tested)
findings: All 214 tests pass (16 new search-explainer + 9 pipeline + 7 embedding-indexer + existing). Typecheck passes. Did not add @quant/ml-pipeline dependency since we defined our own EmbeddingProvider interface via DI pattern (consistent with project conventions). Prettier reformatted some files via lint-staged.
